name_romaji: Jon Wiruherumu Weiman cho shokubutsu saishoku zu
name_en: Botanical Color Illustrations by John Wilhelm Weyman
description_en: A tangible cultural property comprising botanical color illustrations. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City, designated on 1978-05-25. It is held at Daiichi Shiryokan, 3-1 Shiromachi.

name_en: Prohibition Edict of Sakakibara Yasumasa
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a prohibition edict associated with Sakakibara Yasumasa. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City, designated on 1978-05-25. It is located at Ryukoji temple, 401 Takanecho.

name_en: Votive Plaque of Tatebayashi Castle
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a votive plaque (ema) depicting Tatebayashi Castle. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City, designated on 1979-07-30. It is located at Obiki Inari Shrine, 10-1 Obikicho.

name_romaji: Meiji Boshin senso Iwaki shingeki ema
name_en: Votive Plaque of the Iwaki Advance in the Meiji Boshin War
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a votive plaque (ema) depicting the Iwaki advance of the Meiji Boshin War. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City, designated on 1979-07-30. It is located at Obiki Inari Shrine, 10-1 Obikicho.

name_en: Votive Plaque of a Thousand Centipedes
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a votive plaque (ema) depicting a thousand centipedes. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City, designated on 1979-07-30. It is located at Akagi Shrine, 494 Ashitsugicho.

name_en: Votive Plaque of a Centipede and Plum Tree
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a votive plaque (ema) depicting a centipede and a plum tree. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City, designated on 1979-07-30. It is located at Akagi Shrine, 494 Ashitsugicho.

name_en: Letter of Matsudaira Takemoto (Salted Sweetfish)
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a letter of Matsudaira Takemoto concerning salted sweetfish. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City, designated on 1979-07-30. It is held at Daiichi Shiryokan, 3-1 Shiromachi.

name_en: Taiseikyo (Sendai Kuji Hongi Chronicle)
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a copy of the Taiseikyo (Sendai Kuji Hongi). It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City, designated on 1979-07-30. It is held at Daiichi Shiryokan, 3-1 Shiromachi.

name_en: Votive Plaque of Triumphal Return in the Meiji Boshin War
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a votive plaque (ema) commemorating the triumphal return in the Meiji Boshin War. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City, designated on 1979-07-30. It is located at Obiki Inari Shrine, 10-1 Obikicho.

name_en: Coffered Ceiling Paintings of Jokoji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property, coffered ceiling paintings at Jokoji temple. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City, designated on 1987-08-07. It is located at Jokoji temple, 14-2 Nakamachi.

name_romaji: Akimoto Yasutomo shoyo gusoku (unohana-ito-odoshi kinpaku Iyo-do gusoku)
name_en: Armor Used by Akimoto Yasutomo (Gilded Iyo-do Armor with Deutzia-White Lacing)
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a suit of armor used by Akimoto Yasutomo. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City, designated on 1996-03-22. It is located at Obiki Inari Shrine, 10-1 Obikicho.

name_en: Painting of Fudo Myoo (Formerly Held by Kyoin)
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a painting of Fudo Myoo formerly held by Kyoin. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City, designated on 1996-03-22. It is held at Daiichi Shiryokan, 3-1 Shiromachi.

name_en: Group of Gravestones Excavated from the Tatebayashi Castle Site
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a group of gravestones excavated from the Tatebayashi Castle site. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City, designated on 1997-02-24. It is located at Prefectural Tsutsujigaoka Second Park, 4-1 Obikicho.

name_en: Former Residence of a Tatebayashi Domain Retainer
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the former residence of a retainer of the Tatebayashi domain. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City, designated on 1999-10-18. It is located at 5-10 Otemachi.

name_romaji: Jomo Tatebayashi Jonuma shosan suiso zu
name_en: Illustrations of Aquatic Plants of Jonuma in Tatebayashi, Jomo
description_en: A tangible cultural property, illustrations of aquatic plants of Jonuma pond in Tatebayashi. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City, designated on 2001-03-26. It is held at Daiichi Shiryokan, 3-1 Shiromachi.

name_en: Gate of the Town Magistrate
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the gate of the town magistrate (kendan). It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City, designated on 2002-03-25. It is located at 2-1748-1 Honmachi.

name_romaji: Fujiwara no Sengen-zuka oyobi hatsuyama kanren shiryo
name_en: Sengen Mound of Fujiwara and Related Hatsuyama Materials
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the Sengen mound of Fujiwara together with related Hatsuyama materials. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City. It is located at 1127 Fujiwaracho.

name_en: Oshima Okari Jindai Kagura (Dadai Kagura)
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the Oshima Okari jindai kagura (dadai kagura) sacred dance tradition. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City, designated on 1981-03-06. It is located in Oshimacho.

name_en: Sasara of Kamimibayashi
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the sasara performance of Kamimibayashi. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City, designated on 1993-07-16. It is located in Kamimibayashicho.

name_en: Former Residence of Tayama Katai
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the former residence of Tayama Katai. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City, designated on 1971-05-01. It is located in Shiromachi.

name_en: Graves of the Forefathers of Ikuta Yorozu
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the graves of the forefathers of Ikuta Yorozu. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City, designated on 1973-04-01. It is located at Daidoji temple, 2-4-11 Honmachi.

name_en: Akimoto Shrine of Living Enshrinement
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the Akimoto Shrine (ikimatsuri, living enshrinement). It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City, designated on 1973-04-01. It is located at Eimeiji temple, 1510-1 Akoda-Honmachi.

name_en: Tatebayashi Castle Site
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the site of Tatebayashi Castle. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City, designated on 1973-04-01. It is located at 23-1 Shiromachi-Ko and other addresses.

name_romaji: Tanaka Shozo no haka oyobi Kugendo
name_en: Grave of Tanaka Shozo and the Kugendo Hall
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the grave of Tanaka Shozo and the Kugendo hall. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City, designated on 1973-04-01. It is located at Unryuji temple, 1896 Shimohayakawacho.

name_romaji: Tatebayashi jonushu Sakakibara Tadatsugu no haha Shoshitsuin-dono no haka oyobi ishidoro
name_en: Grave and Stone Lantern of Shoshitsuin-dono, Mother of Tatebayashi Castellan Sakakibara Tadatsugu
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the grave and stone lantern of Shoshitsuin-dono, mother of the Tatebayashi castellan Sakakibara Tadatsugu. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City, designated on 1975-03-06. It is located at Senchoji temple, 1975 Togocho.

name_en: Sannozan Tumulus
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the Sannozan burial mound (kofun). It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City, designated on 1977-08-30. It is located at Senchoji temple, 1975-2 Togocho.

name_en: Main Bailey Earthworks and Hachiman Shrine of Tatebayashi Castle
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the main bailey earthworks and Hachiman Shrine of Tatebayashi Castle. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City, designated on 1987-08-07. It is located at 1-3 Shiromachi and other addresses.

name_en: Grave of the Ukiyo-e Artist Kitao Shigemitsu
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the grave of the ukiyo-e artist Kitao Shigemitsu. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City, designated on 1987-08-07. It is located at Kakuoji temple, 1-8 Sakaemachi.

name_en: Hangan Mound of Chizuka
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the Hangan mound of Chizuka. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City, designated on 1987-08-07. It is located at 173-1 Chizukacho.

name_en: Jizo Statue of the Hyuga Righteous Peasants
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the Jizo statue commemorating the righteous peasants (gimin) of Hyuga. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City, designated on 1987-08-07. It is located at 1561-1 Hyugacho-Ko and other addresses.

name_en: Natural Habitat of Tatebayashi-zasa Bamboo Grass
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the natural habitat of Tatebayashi-zasa bamboo grass. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City, designated on 1973-04-01. It is located at 1561-1 Narushimacho and other addresses.

name_en: Bunbuku Sake Brewery Storefront
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the storefront of the Bunbuku sake brewery. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City, designated on 1998-02-12. It is located at 3-15 Nakamachi.

name_en: Shoda Memorial Hall of Shoda Shoyu
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the Shoda Memorial Hall of the Shoda Shoyu company. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City, designated on 2004-03-04. It is located at 3-1 Sakaemachi.

name_en: Archive Storehouse of Shoda Shoyu
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the archive storehouse of the Shoda Shoyu company. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City, designated on 2004-03-04. It is located at 3-1 Sakaemachi.

name_en: Storehouse No. 6 of Shoda Shoyu
description_en: A tangible cultural property, Storehouse No. 6 of the Shoda Shoyu company. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City, designated on 2004-03-04. It is located at 3-1 Sakaemachi.

name_en: Storehouse No. 7 of Shoda Shoyu
description_en: A tangible cultural property, Storehouse No. 7 of the Shoda Shoyu company. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City, designated on 2004-03-04. It is located at 3-1 Sakaemachi.

name_en: Storehouse No. 8 of Shoda Shoyu
description_en: A tangible cultural property, Storehouse No. 8 of the Shoda Shoyu company. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City, designated on 2004-03-04. It is located at 3-1 Sakaemachi.

name_en: Inari Shrine within the Shoda Shoyu Grounds
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the Inari Shrine within the grounds of the Shoda Shoyu company. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City, designated on 2004-03-04. It is located at 3-1 Sakaemachi.

name_romaji: Kyu Tatebayashi nigyo kenban kumiai jimusho
name_en: Former Tatebayashi Nigyo Kenban Guild Office
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the former office of the Tatebayashi nigyo kenban guild. It is municipally designated by Tatebayashi City, designated on 2016-02-25. It is located at 2-1704 Honmachi (2-16-2 Honmachi under residential indication).

name_en: Kamishigo Communal Storehouse
description_en: A tangible cultural property (building), the Kamishigo communal storehouse. It is village-designated by Katashina Village as an important cultural property, designated on 1975-12-17. It is located at 1242-1 Koshimoto-Ko.
